mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM train_question WHERE create_tag = #{createTag}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_question ( title, category, difficulty, description, hints, standard_answer, hot_score, create_tag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{category}, #{difficulty}, #{description}, #{hints}, #{standardAnswer}, #{hotScore}, #{createTag}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

INSERT INTO train_question ( title, category, difficulty, description, hints, standard_answer, hot_score, create_tag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.title}, #{item.category}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.description}, #{item.hints}, #{item.standardAnswer}, #{item.hotScore}, #{item.createTag}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
